def positive_fastapi_response_model_without_orm_mode():
    rule_id = "fastapi_response_model_without_orm_mode"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "FastAPI response models use ORM conversion paths without visible ORM compatibility configuration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
